scripts.e2e:server: npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development CLIENT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 MONGODB_URI=mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/nexus-hrms-e2e QUEUE_DRIVER=inline FILE_STORAGE_DRIVER=local UPLOAD_DIR=./server/uploads-e2e npm --workspace server run seed && npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development CLIENT_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 MONGODB_URI=mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/nexus-hrms-e2e QUEUE_DRIVER=inline FILE_STORAGE_DRIVER=local UPLOAD_DIR=./server/uploads-e2e npm --workspace server run dev:api
scripts.e2e:client: npm --workspace client run build && npm --workspace client run preview -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173
